case_title: ANALISA BELLI VS. CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 IS FOUR YEARS. THERE IS AT LEAST A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE TOLLING OF THE STATUTE TERMINATED PRIOR TO JANUARY 2004. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. WESLEY M. LOWE OF MANNION & LOWE, TEL. NO. 733-1053 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PATRICK M. MCGOVERN OF COX CASTELE NICHOLSON, TEL. NO. (310)284-2298 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. The Statute of limitation as to cause of action 3 is four years. There is at least a triable issue of material fact as to whether the tolling of the statute terminated prior to Jan. 2004. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 = (301/PJB/PM)
